text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
My classmate asked me for advice on how to
copy from the blackboard... But I could not
Provide Solution.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
I informed her to "SMRZ" the main ideas. Yet
apparently, that is High Difficulty.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
My communications are not received... An
unchanging Absolute Magnitude.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Neo Universe is of a different Origin Point than
everyone... That is the cause.
